topup.title: Top up my balance
topup.error: Unable to start the top-up. Please try again later.
topup.success: Top-up successful! Your balance has been updated.

cashout.title: Cash out my balance
cashout.setup_required: You need to set up a payout account (Stripe Connect) before you can cash out your points.
cashout.setup_error: Unable to start the setup. Please try again later.
cashout.error: The transfer failed. Your points have been credited back.
cashout.success: Cashout successful! The transfer is on its way.
cashout.connect_return: Setup submitted to Stripe — verification can take a few moments.
cashout.connect_refresh: The setup link expired, please try again.
